changes:
Orb of Deception (Q) grants movement speed when in the air
Essence Theft (P) is stacked on damaging enemies
Spirit Rush (R) doesn't reset

Trample (P) and Triumphant Roar (E) have swapped
Can build Ability Power
Can solo lane

Bandage Toss (Q) doesn't have extra charges
Cursed Touch (P) reduces magic resist on basic attacks only

Frostbite (E) doesn't have Chill passive
Glacial Storm (R) slow also affects attack speed

Tibbers (R) dies when Annie does
Pyromania (P) Stacks reset on death
Molten Shield (E) doesn't grant movement speed

Frost Shot (Q) toggles slowing basic attacks
Focus (P) builds up critical strikes out of combat
Hawkshot (E) grants bonus gold on kill
Static Field (R) passive zaps nearby enemies
Ablaze (P) explosions do not occur

Feast (R) stacks max 6 times, is lost on kill but can be stacked on anything
Vorpal Spikes (E) toggles the spikes that go through players
Phosphorus Bomb (Q) is an instant explosion

Burning Agony (W) is a toggle of damage AoE around him
Masochism (E) is a buff for a time not an attack
Adrenaline Rush (P) regenerates health over time

Essence Flux (W) passes through all units dealing damage to enemies and granting allies attack speed
Trueshot Barrage (R) deals less damage per enemy hit

The Abilities are completely different, except for the ultimate Crowstorm (R)
Fiddlesticks fear makes the enemy walk randomly

Cannon Barrage (R) has random cannonballs instead of consistent AOE damage
Raise Morale (E) grants move speed and Attack damage both passively and upon activation
Parrrley (Q) grants gold (no more silver serpents)
Demacian Justice (R) does magic damage

Barrel Roll (Q) does full damage no matter time it is on the ground
Drunken Rage (W) last for a long time

The abilities may look similar but are very different
UPGRADE!!! (R) is a buff that lasts a set time not a single ability
H-28G Evolution Turrets (Q) are active globally but die when Heimerdinger does
Tailwind (P) grants global movement speed

Cataclysm (R) is single target
Demacian Standard (E) passive grants armor

Grandmaster's Might (R) grants stacking attack speed per strike
Equipment Mastery (P) grants health for power

Force Pulse (E) requires 6 casts around him to then cast
Riftwalk (R) can stack 10 times
Void Stone (P) transforms some magic damage prevented into attack speed

Killer Instincts (W) enhances her other basic abilities
Voracity (P) grants gold and reduces cooldowns on kill

The Abilities are completely different, except for Divine Blessing (W)
Leveling up doesn't change her attacks
Holy Fervor (P) grants Attack Damage as Ability Power and vice versa
Caustic Spittle (Q) is point and click
Glitterdance (Q) bolts can not deal damage to the same target

Light Binding's (Q) second target is half as affective
Final Spark (R) is now German - Finales Funkeln
Brutal Strikes (W) cleave is a passive and actively increases his damage

Null Zone (W) is an AoE area for a short time
Summon Voidling (P) creates a voidling after a number of casts
Nether Grasp (R) does not have the null zone around the target

Wuju Style (E) passive increases attack damage doubled when active
Double Strike (P) is percent chance based
Alpha Strike (Q) can not be directed after finishing movements

Strut (P) moved from W
Impure Shots (W) passive deals magic damage on each hit with active increasing attack speed and applying grievous wounds
Fury of the Sands (R) magic damage temporarily converts a percentage into Attack Damage

Aspect of the Cougar (R) does not start with a level
Prowl (P) has Hunt passive removed
Bushwhack (W) does insane damage

Blood Boil (W) grants attack and movement speed
Ice Blast (E) a single point and click snowball
Consume (Q) can't target champions but gain buffs based on whats eaten
Visionary (P) every 5 basic attacks the next spell costs no mana - Nunu & Willump get an extra line as they are 2 characters

Vicious Strikes (W) grants Attack Damage, Lifesteal and Spell Vamp
Reckless Swing (E) does not heal the health cost

Aegis Protection (P) blocks damage after casting multiple times
Grand Skyfall (R) is a circle AoE
Heartseeker Strike (E) - Pantheon stands still and strikes

Tremors (R) is a repeating AoE around him
All other abilities are ok

Hallucinate (R) clone explodes dealing more damage but doesn't spawn boxes
Jack in the box (W) can be placed closer together
Empowered Bulwark (P) gains health with Mana

Ricochet (W) toggles bouncing randomly attacks
Spell Shield (E) gain mana instead of health when triggered

The Abilities are completely different
Bruiser and auto attacker
Impale (R) is a single target point and click

Auras of basic abilities are persistent
Power Chord (P) does bonus damage
Crescendo (R) is wider

The Abilities are completely different, except for the ultimate Wish (R)
Can solo lane
Has a point and click silence
Noxious Trap's (R) don't bounce
Explosive Shot (E) is a DoT ability

Gate (E) is a global teleport
Destiny (R) is a global slow and reveal
Loaded Dice (P) grants all allies and himself gold on kill

Deliberating Poison (W) is an AoE spell around him
Ambush (Q) can last up to 50 seconds
Expunge (E) removes poison stacks on enemies
Final Hour (R) can not be extended

Baleful Strike (Q) is point and click
Event Horizon (E) is instant
Equilibrium (P) gains increased mana regeneration based on missing mana

The Abilities are completely different
Infinite Duress (R) is a point and click suppress

Decoy (W) does not mirror other abilities used and does not auto attack
